_comment: Copy this to your own config and run: `panviz render --config my.json`. Any key may be overridden on the command line. Keys starting with '_' are ignored. The browser is auto-detected if installed via `playwright install chromium`; set it explicitly only if detection fails.
_browser_note: Optional. Auto-detected from ~/.cache/ms-playwright or PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH. Override only if needed.
_visual_note: Rendering parameters. Defaults reproduce the accepted Panviz baseline; change with care.
_annotate_sv_note: Label variant nodes with their type and size (e.g. 'INS +10.8 kb'). Off by default; also available as the --annotate-sv flag.
